author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Formally reopen the BDC scientific line under a new charter that preserves historical truth, separates the reboot from BDC Designer, and fixes the first gate on selection physics rather than organism expansion.
research_question: Can the original BDC scientific line be rebooted under explicit historical constraints without silently reviving the broken hidden_rule trajectory?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after the history map and reboot plan are committed.

tests_required: charter states first gate as selection physics rebuild
